message:
fix: multiple bug fixes and test corrections

- fix(key_management): add chunk_index overflow check to prevent nonce reuse
  AES-GCM security requires unique nonces; overflow would cause catastrophic
  nonce reuse. Matches existing check in encrypt.rs.

- fix(qr): correct test assertions for 192-bit minimum entropy
  The code requires >= 192 bits (24 bytes) per NIST recommendations, but
  test incorrectly expected 128 bits (16 bytes) to be accepted.

- fix(gemini): update test expectations for Windows path normalization
  Function intentionally normalizes backslashes to forward slashes for
  cross-platform robustness; tests now reflect this behavior.

- fix(sync): handle ~ as home directory marker in path_to_safe_dirname
  Skip ~ component instead of including it in the safe dirname.

- style: fix collapsible_if clippy warnings in chatgpt.rs and claude_code.rs
  Use if-let chains instead of nested if statements.

- style: formatting fixes from cargo fmt

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
